message:
style(engine): rustfmt and minor refactoring in parser and lifecycle modules

- parser.rs: Reformat long match arms and function signatures (+44/-)
- parser_multi_engine_harness.rs: Reformat multi-line expressions
  and improve readability of harness configuration (+92/-)
- region_lifecycle.rs: Minor formatting adjustments (+5/-)
- global_coherence_checker.rs: Small formatting cleanup (+10/-)

No logic changes — purely whitespace and line-break adjustments
applied by rustfmt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
